top_signals.title: Russia claims foreign spy agencies hacked officials' phones
top_signals.summary: In a statement, Russia's Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had uncovered what it described as a "large-scale operation" involving malicious software installed on the mobile devices of senior Russian officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US House votes for measure that would end Iran war, in blow to Trump  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In 23 months Labour has dragged the UK economy to its knees
top_signals.summary: Reading our interview with billionaire John Caudwell, in which he says he was “misled” by Labour’s pitch for power, I’m reminded of just how unambiguous Keir Starmer and Rachel Reeves were in the run-up to the 2024 election. They promised to be “the most pro-business government this country has ever seen.” Some of us were [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cornish Tin & Lithium find field extension, make new discovery at Tregonning
top_signals.summary: Drilling confirmed that a newly identified lithium-bearing rock formation continues far beyond the area where it was first discovered.

top_signals.title: Hycroft mine in Nevada assessed $10B value, 51-year life
top_signals.summary: The project has an internal rate of return of 30.1% and a payback period of just under three years.
